label: agent loop • todo created up front and updated before complete
query: Three config files in this folder each have debug=true. Change debug to false in all three, then verify by reading them back. Track your progress with a todo list as you work.
notes: Pins todo discipline on a genuinely multi-step task: the model must create the checklist, and at least one later `todo` call must carry a checked box BEFORE the run completes (`todoUpdatedBeforeComplete`) — making a list once and never updating it fails. The task itself is mechanical so the assertion isolates the discipline, not the editing skill.
